infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses the microphone to log food and exercise by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses speech recognition to turn your voice into text when you log food and exercise by voice.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ThanaFit may access your photo library so you can attach photos to your entries, if you choose.
